base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fireball_burst_impact — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1985 super mario bros. dot. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame burst — dot → cross → star → fading ring; spawns at fireball's impact point on enemy or wall; composited over background, not attached to any actor
